nonBlockingIssues.description: URL-encoding round-trip test name is misleading — only tests determinism, not actual URL encoding/decoding.
Hardcoded rgba() colors in Square.tsx instead of CSS variables — won't adapt to dark mode.
Plain <button> elements instead of shadcn/ui — correct choice since no shadcn UI components are installed.
checkBingo tests cover only 3 of 5 columns directly (others covered indirectly via structure tests).
Confetti particles regenerate on every re-render causing visual flicker — should be memoized with useState or useMemo.
Weak test assertion for 'visually distinct styling' — only checks toBeTruthy() on text content.
Minor modulo bias in generateRandomSeed (negligible for game seeds with 62^10 space).
generateDifferentSeed could theoretically return same seed after 10 max attempts (astronomically unlikely).

appliedUpdates.description: Added seed.ts and marks.ts to Game Logic section in architecture.md
Added Testing Setup section to architecture.md documenting vitest config, jsdom docblock pattern, and test co-location
Added CSS Design System section to architecture.md documenting custom properties and Tailwind v4 patterns
Added Zod v4 version note to environment.md
Added Testing section to environment.md with vitest, @testing-library, and jsdom info; noted lint===typecheck

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Fix Key Files section: change app/ path prefixes to src/ (e.g., app/routes/__root.tsx → src/routes/__root.tsx, app/lib/bingo.ts → src/lib/bingo.ts, app/components/Board.tsx → src/components/Board.tsx). Multiple reviewers flagged this inconsistency.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: board-generation, board-display-polish, square-marking, celebration reviews all noted AGENTS.md lists app/ paths but actual project uses src/. The directory-convention.md library doc already acknowledges this mismatch.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update shadcn/ui guidance: either install needed shadcn/ui components (Button, Card) or change the Coding Conventions section to acknowledge that hand-crafted Tailwind components are acceptable. Currently says 'use Button, Card, etc. from shadcn/ui where appropriate' but no UI components are installed.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: board-display-polish review noted src/components/ui/ is empty despite components.json existing and AGENTS.md recommending shadcn usage.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add Key Files entry for src/lib/seed.ts (shared seed generation utility used by both game.tsx and index.tsx) and src/lib/marks.ts (mark state management).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: new-game-button review noted seed.ts is undocumented; square-marking added marks.ts. Both are core shared utilities.

rejectedObservations.observation: Frontend-worker skill's TDD step doesn't apply to pure UI features.
rejectedObservations.reason: This is a skill-level suggestion, not an AGENTS.md update. The reviewer already noted it as a suggested skill change. Not within scrutiny validator's scope to modify skills.

rejectedObservations.observation: Worker skipped manual browser verification in bingo-detection.
rejectedObservations.reason: This is a worker compliance issue, not a shared state gap. The feature was verified via comprehensive automated tests (35 tests) and passed user testing. No action needed in shared state docs.
